title: Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat — Chapter 1139
main_description: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 167 cleaned dialogue lines.
